assumptions.text: Forcing Google+ identity across Gmail / YouTube / Search will pull existing Google users into active social use of Google+ at sufficient rate to bootstrap network effects against Facebook.
Premium short-form video viewing happens primarily on mobile during in-between moments (commute, queues, breaks) and a mobile-only product fits that demand.

A residential-house metaphor maps cleanly enough onto computer functions (rooms = applications, drawers = folders) that novice users will perform tasks faster than they would with the existing Program Manager UI.
Tight Amazon Prime / shopping integration plus a Prime-bundled subsidy is enough to pull existing Prime users to switch from iOS or Android to Fire OS as a primary phone.

Blind-taste-test preference for the sweeter formula translates to actual purchasing behavior — consumers who prefer the taste in a blind comparison will buy and continue buying the new formula in the open market.
